characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The Ace: Generally considered the star of the in-universeSports Night, commands a higher salary (which eventually becomes a bone of contention between him and Dan), and is very attractive to the opposite sex. Broken Ace: When the series begins he's coming off a bad divorce and barely functional in his depression. If You Ever Do Anything to Hurt Her...: Before he and Dana become a couple he gives Gordon a stern warning when he learns that Gordon has slept with Sally.

characters.name: CaseyMcCall
characters.description: The Ace: Generally considered the star of the in-universeSports Night, commands a higher salary (which eventually becomes a bone of contention between him and Dan), and is very attractive to the opposite sex. characters.name: Dan Rydell
characters.description: Heel Realization: Begins to question whether he's a good man when he discovers that he slept with guest anchor Bobbie Bernstein and then forgot her. Ivy League for Everyone: Takes great pride in being a Dartmouth alumnus, which he even tries to woo Rebecca with. The Un-Favourite: Has been on the outs with his father, at least, since his adolescent stoner ways led to his little brother getting into a fatal accident while driving high.

characters.name: Jeremy Goodwin
characters.description: Meta Guy: About as hyperaware asAbed, if more grounded in reality. Tranquil Fury: See him when a football player sexually assaults Natalie. Jeremy doesn't yell. He doesn't shake the guy's hand. He does threaten to pay someone $50 dollars to knife the football player.
